public_basis: A regional incident-rate disparity requires investigation before any vendor sanction.

sources.record: A vendor staffing transition occurred in West before the observation window.
Counts by severity: West high 160/800, low 4/200; East high 40/200, low 16/800.

public_test_menu.operation: Compute the absolute incident-rate gap between West and East using all routed items.
Compute each within-severity absolute West/East incident-rate gap and return the maximum.

constraints: No vendor policy document or sanction authority is supplied.
